howItWorks.intro: This spirit box sweep rate calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Sweep Time
rules.explanation: Total time to scan through all channels.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: 75-150ms is common. Faster sweeps reduce radio bleed-through but may miss responses.

faq.q: AM or FM for spirit box?
faq.a: Both are used. FM has less static, AM may capture more anomalous audio.
